## Checklist
- [ ] Every commit has DCO sign-off (`git commit -s`)
- [ ] `ruff check` + `ruff format --check` clean
- [ ] `mypy --strict` clean
- [ ] `pnpm lint` + `pnpm typecheck` clean
- [ ] New code cites SRS/NFR anchors it delivers
- [ ] If new dep added: license verified AGPL-compatible
- [ ] No autonomous AI mutation added; draft-and-review preserved (§CLAUDE.md 1.1)
